creator: des@thinksec.com
text:
The packing list for the x11/XFree86-4 port lists many files the port does
not install, and misses some it does.  In addition, it lists some directories
as plain files.

How-To-Repeat: 
Install XFree86 4.0.3 from ports on a virgin machine, answering yes to every
configuration question.  When the build is done, compare a list of installed
files with the packing list:

$ cd /usr/X11R6
# the line below is a trick to make diffing the two lists simpler
$ cp -r /etc/X11 .
$ find * -type f | sort >/tmp/Xpractice
$ grep '^[^@]' /var/db/pkg/XFree86-4.0.3_3/+CONTENTS | sort >/tmp/Xtheory
$ diff -u /tmp/Xtheory /tmp/Xpractice

+++ /tmp/Xpractice      Thu Apr 26 23:02:31 2001
